toolSpec.name: get_data_gen_instructions
toolSpec.description: Get instructions for generating synthetic data based on a business description.

business_description.description: A detailed description of the business domain and use case. The more specific and comprehensive the description, the better the data generation instructions will be.

toolSpec.name: validate_and_save_data
toolSpec.description: Validate JSON Lines data and save it as CSV files.

toolSpec.name: load_to_storage
toolSpec.description: Load data to one or more storage targets.

toolSpec.name: execute_pandas_code
toolSpec.description: Execute pandas code to generate synthetic data and save it as CSV files.
